title: Country Girl (Shake It for Me)
why_this_song: Country Girl (Shake It for Me) by Luke Bryan (2011) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Country girl, shake it for me, girl
Country girl, shake it for me, girl
For the DJ spinnin' that country song
Shake it for the birds, shake it for the bees
Shake it for the catfish swimmin' down deep in the creek

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "shake" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "shake" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "girl" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "girl" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You know you've got everybody lookin'
Yeah, move like the river flows

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Got a little boom in my big truck
Country girl, shake it for me, girl

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Country Girl (Shake It for Me)" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Country Girl (Shake It for Me)", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Country Girl (Shake It for Me)" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Country Girl (Shake It for Me)" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Country Girl (Shake It for Me)", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Country Girl (Shake It for Me)", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
